creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 13:34:09 2012
New Revision: 304512
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304512

Log:
  Add trytond_stock_lot 2.4.0, tryton Application Platform (Stock Lot
  Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171438
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/
  head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 13:33:00 2012	(r304511)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 13:34:09 2012	(r304512)
@@ -140,6 +140,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock_forecast
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock_inventory_location
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock_location_sequence
+    SUBDIR += trytond_stock_lot
     SUBDIR += trytond_stock_supply
     SUBDIR += trytond_timesheet
     SUBDIR += venice

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 13:34:09 2012	(r304512)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_stock_lot
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.0
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Stock Lot Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_product>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_product \
+		trytond_stock>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_stock
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 13:34:09 2012	(r304512)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_stock_lot-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 4ecc3dbfba91a95134ef31dc04149de2f93e095cfb44f39c00c1eb560c2cd5ed
+SIZE (trytond_stock_lot-2.4.0.tar.gz) = 20711

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 13:34:09 2012	(r304512)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Stock Lot Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_stock_lot/pkg-plist	Wed Sep 19 13:34:09 2012	(r304512)
@@ -0,0 +1,37 @@
